---
title: q.transform Roadmap
---

- [ ] Define the shared pandas-friendly `fit`/`transform` protocol
- [ ] Add split-aware dataset integration with explicit fit partitions
- [ ] Add fitted imputers
- [ ] Add standard, robust, min-max, and max-absolute scalers
- [ ] Add fitted clipping, winsorization, and outlier detectors
- [ ] Add categorical encoders with unseen-category policies
- [ ] Add PCA and related reduction adapters
- [ ] Add variance, mutual-information, and recursive feature selection
- [ ] Add independent feature and target pipelines with target inversion
- [ ] Serialize fitted state and validate training-boundary provenance
